perturbation.original_text: This Agreement contains the sole and entire agreement between the Parties related to the disclosure of Confidential Information with respect to the Purpose. This Agreement may only be modified in a writing executed by both Parties. Should any provision of this Agreement be deemed illegal or otherwise unenforceable, that provision shall be severed and the remainder of this Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement contains the sole and entire agreement between the Parties related to the disclosure of Confidential Information with respect to the Purpose. This Agreement may be modified orally by mutual agreement of authorized representatives of both parties. Should any provision of this Agreement be deemed illegal or otherwise unenforceable, that provision shall be interpreted in a manner that most closely reflects the original intention of the parties, and the remainder of this Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.
perturbation.explanation: The original text has an integration clause, stating it is the entire agreement and can *only* be modified in writing. The revised text allows oral modifications by authorised representatives, which will be contradictory. Furthermore, instead of severing the illegal or unenforceable part, it will be changed with something that make sense with the original intention of the parties. This directly contradicts the final sentence of section 14, which states that 'Other than this Agreement, no contract or agreement providing for any relationshi p involving the Parties (whether relating to the Purpose or otherwise) will be deemed to exist between the Parties unless and until a final definitive agreement(s) has been executed and delivered by each of the Parties, and unless and until any such defini tive agreement(s) has been executed an delivered, neither Party will be under any legal obligation of any kind or nature whatsoever, except for the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Other than this Agreement, no contract or agreement providing for any relationshi p involving the Parties (whether relating to the Purpose or otherwise) will be deemed to exist between the Parties unless and until a final definitive agreement(s) has been executed and delivered by each of the Parties, and unless and until any such defini tive agreement(s) has been executed an delivered, neither Party will be under any legal obligation of any kind or nature whatsoever, except for the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that the agreement could only be modified in writing. The changed text explicitly allows for oral modifications. This directly contradicts the statement in the contradicted text that no agreement exists outside of the written agreement, thereby creating a strong in-text contradiction regarding how the agreement can be modified and what constitutes a valid agreement between the parties.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall n ot create, nor will it create an obligation to form a joint venture, partnership or other formal business relationship of any kind nor will it prohibit either Party from engaging in similar discussions , relationships, or transactions with a similar Purpose , with any other third party.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall create an obligation to form a joint venture, partnership or other formal business relationship of any kind and it will prohibit either Party from engaging in similar discussions , relationships, or transactions with a similar Purpose , with any other third party.
perturbation.explanation: The original text explicitly states that the Agreement does not create any obligation to form a joint venture or partnership, nor does it prohibit either party from engaging in similar discussions with third parties. The change completely inverts this, stating that the Agreement *does* create such an obligation and *does* prohibit such discussions with third parties. This creates a direct contradiction that makes the whole text contradictory, since if one party can't talk about the information with other parties, then its not a mutual nondisclosure agreement, like its explained in the title of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Reciprocal Non -Disclosure and Confidentiality Agreement This Reciprocal Non-Disclosure and Confidentiality Agreement (the “ Agreement ”) is made and entered into this ______ day of __________________, 20__ (“Effective Date ”) by, between and among the ______________ (“Company”) having its principal place of business at _____________________________ and ____________________ (“Individual ”). Company and Individual shall hereinafter collectively be referred to as the “Parties ” and individually as the “ Party ”. Background The Parties desire to discuss certain business evaluations and reviews and to exchange information for the purpose of a conducting those evaluations and reviews and to provide an educational project (“Purpose ”). In order to further the Purpose, and in order for the Parties to share or receive information under terms that will protect the confidential and proprietary nature of such information, the Parties desire to enter into this Agreement. Agreement The Parties agree as follows: 1. The Parties may find it beneficial to disclose to each other certain information which may include, but is not limited to, trade secrets, discoveries, ideas, concepts, know -how, techniques, designs, specifications, drawings, maps, blueprints, diagrams, flow and other technical, financial or business information , as well as third party information furnished under an obligation of confidentiality (“Confidential Information ”). Information shall be deemed to be Confidential Information if it is marked confidential, or if, under the circumstances surrounding disclosure, it should reasonably be considered to be Confidential Information. Additionally, the disclosing Party may confirm, within three (3) days of providing any information, that such information is to be t reated as Confidential Information.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies that the agreement does not create an obligation to form a joint venture, partnership, or other formal business relationship, nor does it prohibit discussions with third parties. The changed text directly contradicts this by stating that the agreement *does* create such an obligation and *does* prohibit such discussions. This is a direct reversal, creating an in-text contradiction. The contradicted text states the agreement is a 'Reciprocal Non-Disclosure and Confidentiality Agreement' made between two parties for the 'Purpose' of discussing business evaluations and exchanging information. The change prohibits such discussions with third parties, directly contradicting the foundational purpose of the agreement outlined in the contradicted text. This aligns with the definition of 'Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction' as it introduces inconsistencies in key obligations, making interpretation unclear.

perturbation.original_text: Neither this Agreement, nor any rights hereunder, in whole or in part, shall be assignable or otherwise transferable by either Party.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement, and all rights hereunder, in whole or in part, shall be freely assignable and transferable by either Party.
perturbation.explanation: The original text explicitly prohibits the assignment or transfer of the Agreement or any rights under it by either party. The changed text directly contradicts this by stating that the Agreement and all rights under it are freely assignable and transferable by either party. This makes a text contradictory to section 4, because if the agreement can be transfered or assigned to someone else, then section 4 would no longer apply to the actual parts of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All Confidential Information shall remain the exclusive property of the disclosing Party. The disclosu re of Confidential Information by the disclosing Party shall not constitute an express or implied grant to the receiving Party, of any rights to or under the disclosing Party’s patents, copyrights, trade secrets, trademarks or any other intellectual proper ty rights. Upon the disclosing Party’s request, at the completion of the Purpose, all Confidential Information shall be either returned to the disclosing Party or destroyed and certified in writing that such Confidential Information has been destroyed. Notwithstanding the return or destruction of the Confidential Information, the receiving Party will continue to be bound by its confidentiality and other obligations hereunder in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that the agreement is freely assignable and transferable, directly contradicting the contradicted text. The contradicted text stipulates that Confidential Information remains the exclusive property of the disclosing Party, and that the receiving Party continues to be bound by confidentiality even after the return or destruction of the information. If the agreement is freely assignable, the 'receiving party' could change, thus creating a contradiction as the new party may not be bound by the original confidentiality agreement. Therefore the change creates a clear conflict within the document.
